faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Harrison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal services in Harrison range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of the nest, its location, and accessibility. We provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees after our inspection.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Harrison?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Harrison locations. Once on-site, hornet nest removal typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the nest's size and location. We prioritize emergency situations involving nests near entryways or high-traffic areas.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Harrison?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and professional techniques to safely eliminate hornets while minimizing risk to your family, pets, and property. Our technicians follow strict safety protocols and will advise you on any necessary precautions during treatment.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than yellow jackets and most wasps, typically building large, enclosed paper nests in trees or under eaves. They're more aggressive than other stinging insects when defending their nests. Our Harrison technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all stinging insect species.
